answer: Yes, ClickUp provides API access on the Free Forever plan [1][2]. You can self-serve this access by generating a personal API token through the platform to authenticate your requests [3]. While the API is available to all users, specific endpoints, parameters, and rate limits are determined by your Workspace plan [4][3][5]. For Free Forever workspaces, the API is subject to a rate limit of 100 requests per minute per token [5]. You can manage your API integration directly through your ClickUp account settings without requiring manual approval for initial access [3].

results.title: Get Started with the ClickUp API
